sections.title: Halwa Tehenia
sections.text: ‘Halwa tehenia” designates a heat-processed food product made of tahina, natural sugars and other ingredients with the composition provided for in Section 3. Its texture is consistent or crumbly (Fibrous Halwa).
sections.retrieval_text:
DEFINITIONS > Halwa Tehenia
number=2.1
level=2
‘Halwa tehenia” designates a heat-processed food product made of tahina, natural sugars and other ingredients with the composition provided for in Section 3. Its texture is consistent or crumbly (Fibrous Halwa).

page_spans.text: ‘Halwa tehenia” designates a heat-processed food product made of tahina, natural sugars and other ingredients with the composition provided for in Section 3. Its texture is consistent or crumbly (Fibrous Halwa).

sections.title: FOOD ADDITIVES
sections.text: 4.1 Only acidity regulators and emulsifiers listed in Table 3 of the General Standard for Food Additives (CODEX STAN 192-1995) are acceptable for use in foods conforming to this Standard.

sections.title: CONTAMINANTS
sections.text:
The products covered by this Standard shall comply with the Maximum Levels of the General Standard for Contaminants and Toxins in Food and Feed (CODEX STAN 193-1995).
The products covered by this Standard shall comply with the maximum residue limits for pesticides established by the Codex Alimentarius Commission.

The products covered by this Standard shall comply with the maximum residue limits for pesticides established by the Codex Alimentarius Commission.

page_spans.text:

The products covered by this Standard shall comply with the maximum residue limits for pesticides established by the Codex Alimentarius Commission.

sections.title: HYGIENE REQUIREMENTS
sections.text:
It is recommended that the products covered by the provisions of this Standard be prepared and handled in accordance with the appropriate sections of the General Principles of Food Hygiene (CAC/RCP 1-1969), and other relevant Codex texts such as Codes of Hygienic Practice and Codes of Practice.
The products should comply with any microbiological criteria established in accordance with the Principles for the Establishment and Application of Microbiological Criteria for Foods (CAC/GL 21-1997).

It is recommended that the products covered by the provisions of this Standard be prepared and handled in accordance with the appropriate sections of the General Principles of Food Hygiene (CAC/RCP 1-1969), and other relevant Codex texts such as Codes of Hygienic Practice and Codes of Practice.

sections.title: LABELLING
sections.text:
Labelling should comply with the provisions of the General Standard for the Labelling of Pre-packaged Foods (CODEX STAN 1-1985).
The name of the product for labelling purposes shall be: “Halwa Tehenia”, “Halwa Shamia” or “Halva”
Optional ingredients, if used, shall be mentioned next to the name of the product.
The label shall not be applied directly on the product.

sections.title: Packaging
sections.text: Halwa Tehenia should be packaged in suitable containers that are tightly closed to protect the product from humidity and contamination, and that impede the product from sticking on the packaging material.

sentences.original: Halwa Tehenia should be packaged in suitable containers that are tightly closed to protect the product from humidity and contamination, and that impede the product from sticking on the packaging material.

classification.sentence: Halwa Tehenia should be packaged in suitable containers that are tightly closed to protect the product from humidity and contamination, and that impede the product from sticking on the packaging material.
classification.pattern: Subject + Modal verb 'should' + Verb + Description of container properties and protection purpose

components.subject: Halwa Tehenia
components.conditions: in suitable containers that are tightly closed to protect the product from humidity and contamination, and that impede product sticking on the packaging material

classification.justification: Normative advice with 'should' indicating packaging requirements and protective features; partial match to obligation template.
notes: Packaging instructions with modal recommendation.

sentences.original: The means of transportation must provide protection to the product from the various climatic effects that might alter its characteristics or spoil it.

classification.sentence: The means of transportation must provide protection to the product from the various climatic effects that might alter its characteristics or spoil it.

classification.pattern: Subject + Modal verb 'must' + Verb + Purpose clause

sentences.original: The product shall be stored inside well-ventilated warehouses, away from all sources of heat and sun and any other material that might lead to its contamination.
